name: ridgeline
description: Build harness for long-horizon software execution

scripts.build: tsc && rm -rf dist/agents && cp -r src/agents dist/agents && rm -rf dist/flavours && cp -r src/flavours dist/flavours && rm -rf dist/plugin && cp -r plugin dist/plugin && cp src/shapes/*.json dist/shapes/
scripts.lint: npm run lint:code && npm run lint:markdown && npm run lint:agents && npm run lint:fallow
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:unit
